title: Επιπτώσεις των γραμμικών μετασχηματισμών στα μέτρα θέσης και διασποράς

yaml.title: Επιπτώσεις των γραμμικών μετασχηματισμών στα μέτρα θέσης και διασποράς
yaml.author: Κώστας Κούδας

markdown.markdown:
```{r} #| label: setup #| include: false knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) library(kableExtra) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false rm(list = ls()) ```
⚠️️ΥΠΟ ΚΑΤΑΣΚΕΥΗ⚠️
```{r} #| echo: false xx <- rnorm(1000, mean =4, sd=1) myDatax <- data.frame(xx= xx) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDatax, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ```{r} #| echo: false if(!require(ggplot2)){ install.packages("ggplot2") library(ggplot2) } ``` ```{r} #| echo: false dataPlot <- ggplot(myDatax, aes(x="", y=xx)) dataPlot + geom_boxplot() + geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) + geom_jitter(shape=16, size=1,position=position_jitter(0.2)) ``` ```{r} dataPloth <- ggplot(myDatax, aes(x=xx)) dataPloth + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density))) + geom_density(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.6, fill = "green") ``` # Προσθέσεις - αφαιρέσεις ::: {.panel-tabset} ## Προσθέσεις ```{r} #| echo: false xSYN3 <- xx+3 myDataxSYN3 <- data.frame(x= xx, xSYN3=xSYN3) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxSYN3, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Αφαιρέσεις ```{r} #| echo: false xPLIN1 <- xx-1 myDataxPLIN1 <- data.frame(x= xx, xPLIN1=xPLIN1) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxPLIN1, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` # Πολλαπλασιασμοί - διαιρέσεις ::: {.panel-tabset} ## Πολλαπλασιασμός με θετικό ```{r} #| echo: false xEPI2 <- 2*xx myDataxEPI2 <- data.frame(x= xx, xEPI2=xEPI2) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxEPI2, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Διαίρεση με θετικό ```{r} #| echo: false xDIA3 <- xx/3 myDataxDIA3 <- data.frame(x= xx, xDIA3=xDIA3) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxDIA3, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Πολλαπλασιασμός με αρνητικό ```{r} #| echo: false xEPIplin2 <- -2*xx myDataxEPIplin2 <- data.frame(x= xx, xEPIplin2=xEPIplin2) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxEPIplin2, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` :::
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml:
```{r} #| label: setup #| include: false knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) library(kableExtra) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false rm(list = ls()) ```
⚠️️ΥΠΟ ΚΑΤΑΣΚΕΥΗ⚠️
# Παρουσίαση αρχικών δεδομένων ```{r} #| echo: false xx <- rnorm(1000, mean =4, sd=1) myDatax <- data.frame(xx= xx) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDatax, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ```{r} #| echo: false if(!require(ggplot2)){ install.packages("ggplot2") library(ggplot2) } ``` ```{r} #| echo: false dataPlot <- ggplot(myDatax, aes(x="", y=xx)) dataPlot + geom_boxplot() + geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) + geom_jitter(shape=16, size=1,position=position_jitter(0.2)) ``` ```{r} dataPloth <- ggplot(myDatax, aes(x=xx)) dataPloth + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density))) + geom_density(linewidth = 1, alpha = 0.6, fill = "green") ``` # Προσθέσεις - αφαιρέσεις ::: {.panel-tabset} ## Προσθέσεις ```{r} #| echo: false xSYN3 <- xx+3 myDataxSYN3 <- data.frame(x= xx, xSYN3=xSYN3) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxSYN3, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Αφαιρέσεις ```{r} #| echo: false xPLIN1 <- xx-1 myDataxPLIN1 <- data.frame(x= xx, xPLIN1=xPLIN1) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxPLIN1, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` # Πολλαπλασιασμοί - διαιρέσεις ::: {.panel-tabset} ## Πολλαπλασιασμός με θετικό ```{r} #| echo: false xEPI2 <- 2*xx myDataxEPI2 <- data.frame(x= xx, xEPI2=xEPI2) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxEPI2, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Διαίρεση με θετικό ```{r} #| echo: false xDIA3 <- xx/3 myDataxDIA3 <- data.frame(x= xx, xDIA3=xDIA3) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxDIA3, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` ## Πολλαπλασιασμός με αρνητικό ```{r} #| echo: false xEPIplin2 <- -2*xx myDataxEPIplin2 <- data.frame(x= xx, xEPIplin2=xEPIplin2) ``` ```{r} #| echo: false #| results: asis #| message: false knitr::kable(head(myDataxEPIplin2, n=100)) %>% kable_styling("striped", full_width = F) %>% scroll_box(width = "max-content", height = "200px") ``` :::
